description_long: This is a weathered rectangular speed limit sign displaying 'SPEED LIMIT 35' in bold black letters and numbers on a white background, with visible rust and dirt stains indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The sign is mounted on a single, thin, black metal post that is noticeably bent in two places, giving it a zigzag appearance. The sign face is slightly tilted, adding to its aged and possibly neglected look. The metal post appears sturdy but is not perfectly straight, suggesting it may have been impacted or bent over time. The sign is typical of those found on urban or suburban roadsides, providing clear speed regulation to passing vehicles. The overall construction is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, focusing solely on visibility and durability.
description: A weathered, rectangular speed limit sign reading 'SPEED LIMIT 35' on a white background, mounted on a bent black metal post. The sign shows rust and dirt, indicating long-term outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sign face with 'SPEED LIMIT 35' clearly visible and the bent post beneath.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the sign and the pronounced zigzag bend in the post.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the sign, with the text reversed and the post's bend visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thin, bent post and the edge of the sign plate.
